Page 1 of 5

MINUTES OF THE THIRTIETH BUDGET, HUMAN RESOURCES AND COMPENSATION
COMMITTEE MEETING OF THE NEW DEVELOPMENT BANK HELD ON MARCH 19, 2025 AT
09:00 (CHINA STANDARD TIME)
PRESENT:
Committee Members
i. Ms. Manisha Sinha (Director for India, Chairperson)
ii. Mr. Solomon Arokiaraj (Alternate Director for India)
iii. Ms. Ivan Tiago Machado Oliveira (Director for Brazil)
iv. Ms. Ekaterina Guseva (Temporary Alternate Director for Russia)
v. Mr. Bo Zhang (Alternate Director for China)
vi. Dr. Duncan Pieterse (Director for South Africa)
vii. Ms. Thuraiya Alhashmi ( Additional Director for the Constituency of Bangladesh, the
United Arab Emirates and Egypt)
viii. Mr. Atter Hannoura (Additional Alternate Director for the Constituency of Bangladesh,
the United Arab Emirates and Egypt)
ix. H.E. Mrs. Dilma Rousseff (NDB President and Committee Member)
Advisors and Other Participants Accompanying Directors and Alternate Directors
i. Mr. Dmitry Atapin, Deputy Head, Cooperation with International Financial Institutions
Division in the Department for International Financial Affairs, Ministry of Finance,
Russia
ii. Mr. Kalyan Revella, Counsellor (Economic), Embassy of India in Beijing, India
iii. Mr. Shang Gao, Officer, Finance and Project Management Division, Department of
International Economic and Financial Cooperation, Ministry of Finance, China
iv. Mr. Mfundo Hlatshwayo, Chief Director, BRICS, Global and Emerging Markets,
International and Regional Economic Policy, National Treasury, South Africa
v. Mr. Abdul Quader, Deputy Secretary, Economic Relations Division, Ministry of
Finance, Bangladesh
Vice-Presidents
i. Mr. Vladimir Kazbekov, Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer (“COO”)
BUDGET, HUMAN RESOURCES AND
COMPENSATION COMMITTEE
2025-BHRC31-DOC-003

Page 2 of 5

ii. Mr. Anil Kishora, Vice-President and Chief Risk Officer (“CRO”)
iii. Mr. Qiangwu Zhou, Vice-President and Chief Administrative Officer (“CAO”)
iv. Mr. Monale Ratsoma, Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer (“CFO”)
Secretary to the Committee
i. Ms. Yolande Dwarika, Director General and Corporate Secretary
Other New Development Bank Staff
(Attachment I)
1. Adoption of the Agenda
The Budget, Human Resources and Compensation Committee (“Committee” or
“BHRC”) considered and adopted the Agenda of the 30th Committee Meeting (2025-
BHRC30-DOC-001-REV1).
2. Leave of Absence
The Director for China was absent and represented by the Alternate Director. The
Director for Russia was absent and represented by the Temporary Alternate Director.
The meeting had the requisite quorum.
3. Approval of Minutes and Summary of the 2 9th Meeting of the Budget, Human
Resources and Compensation Committee held on December 6, 2024
The Committee considered and approved the Minutes ( 2025-BHRC30-DOC-003) and
Summary (2025-BHRC30-DOC-004) of the 29th Committee Meeting held on December
6, 2024.
4. Record of Inter-sessional Decisions
The Committee took note of the Note on the Inter -sessional Decisions of the
Committee (2025-BHRC30-DOC-005).
5. Matters Arising
The Committee considered the Matters Arising ( 2025-BHRC30-DOC-006) and took
note of the progress.
6. Budget
a. Budget Utilisation Report for CY2024

Page 3 of 5

The Committee considered the Budget Utilisation Report for CY 2024 (2025-BHRC30-
DOC-007) and took note thereof.
b. Proposed Benchmarking of the Budget Review Mechanism
The Committee considered the Benchmarking of the Budget Review Mechanism
(2025-BHRC30-DOC-008) and took note thereof.
c. Terms of Reference of the Budget Controller Function
The Committee considered the Cover Note (2025-BHRC30-DOC-009-a-REV1) and the
Terms of Reference of the Budget Controller Function (2025-BHRC30-DOC-009-b). The
Committee recommended that the Board of Directors approve the Terms of Reference
of the Budget Controller Function.
d. Budget Utilisation Report CY 2024 of the Independent Evaluation Office
The Committee considered the Budget Utilisation Report CY 2024 of the Independent
Evaluation Office (2025-BHRC30-DOC-010) and took note thereof.
7. Human Resources
a. Human Resources Update
The Committee considered the Human Resources Update ( 2025-BHRC30-DOC-011)
and took note thereof.
b. Proposal for Changes in the Organization Structure of Information Technology
Division
The Committee did not consider the Proposal for Changes in the Organization
Structure of Information Technology Division ( 2025-BHRC30-DOC-013). The
Committee requested that the Proposal for Changes in the Organization Structure of
Information Technology Division be submitted inter-sessionally to the BHRC for
consideration.
8. Ethics Update
The Committee considered the Ethics Update (2025-BHRC30-DOC-012) and took note
thereof.
9. Any Other Business
The meeting ended with thanks from the Chairperson.

Page 4 of 5

Attachment I
The following staff Member s attended the meeting for relevant agenda items with the
approval of the Chairperson:
Corporate Secretary Department:
i. Mr. Weijie Liu, Principal Professional
ii. Mr. Oreste Pedro Maia Andrade, Principal Professional
iii. Ms. Miya Liu, Senior Professional
iv. Ms. Angela Gu, Senior Officer
v. Ms. Shuang Zhao, Senior Officer
vi. Mr. Christopher Newby, Short-term Consultant

iv. Mr. Marco Aurélio Picini de Moura, Short-term Consultant

15:00 (CHINA STANDARD TIME)

Vice-Presidents

ii. Mr. Anil Kishora, Vice-President and Chief Risk Officer (“CRO”)
iii. Mr. Qiangwu Zhou, Vice-President and Chief Administrative Officer (“CAO”)
iv. Mr. Monale Ratsoma, Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer (“CFO”)
Secretary to the Committee

(Attachment I)
1. Adoption of the Agenda
The Budget, Human Resources and Compensation Committee (“Committee” or
“BHRC”) considered and adopted the Agenda of the 31st Committee Meeting
(2025-BHRC31-DOC-001-REV1).
2. Leave of Absence
The Director for Russ ia was absent and represented by the Temporary Alternate
Director. The meeting had the requisite quorum.
3. Approval of Minutes and Summary of the 30 th Meeting of the Budget, Human
Resources and Compensation Committee held on March 19, 2025
The Committee considered and approved the Minutes (2025 -BHRC31-DOC-003)
and Summary (2025 -BHRC31-DOC-004) of the 30th Committee Meeting held on
March 19, 2024.
4. Record of Inter-sessional Circulations
The Committee took note of the Note on the Inter -sessional Circulations of the
Committee (2025-BHRC31-DOC-005).
5. Matters Arising
The Committee considered the Matters Arising (2 025-BHRC31-DOC-006-REV1)
and took note of the progress.

3

6. Budget
a. Budget Utilisation Report for Q1 2025
The Committee considered the Budget Utilisation Report for the period ended
March 2025 (025-BHRC31-DOC-007) and took note thereof.
b. Budget Utilisation Report for Q1 2025 of the Independent Evaluation Office
The Committee considered the Budget Utilisation Report of the Independent
Evaluation Office (IEO) for the first quarter (Q1) of 2025 (2025-BHRC31-DOC-008)
and took note thereof.
7. Human Resources
a. Human Resources Update
The Committee considered the Human Resources Update (2025-BHRC31-DOC-
009) and took note thereof.
b. Proposal for Changes in the Organi zation Structure of Information Technology
Division
The Committee considered the Note on Proposal for Changes in the Organization
Structure of Information Technology Division (2025-BHRC31-DOC-010) and
provided guidance thereon.
8. Ethics Update
The Committee considered the Ethics Update (202 5-BHRC31-DOC-011) and took
note thereof.
9. Any Other Business
The meeting ended with thanks from the Chairperson.

4

MINUTES OF THE THIRTY -SECOND BUDGET, HUMAN RESOURCES AND
COMPENSATION COMMITTEE MEETING OF THE NEW DEVELOPMENT BANK HELD
ON SEPTEMBER 16, 2025 AT 09:00 (CHINA STANDARD TIME)
PRESENT:
Commitee Members
i. Mr. Ivan Tiago Machado Oliveira (Director for Brazil, Chairperson)
ii. Ms. Rebeca Gouget Sérgio Miranda (Alternate Director for Brazil) (via video)
iii. Ms. Ekaterina Guseva (Temporary Alternate Director for Russia)
iv. Ms. Anu P. Mathai (Director for India)

vi. Dr. Duncan Pieterse (Director for South Africa)

viii. Dr. Eman Fakhry (Additional Director for the Constituency of Bangladesh, the United Arab
Emirates, Egypt and Algeria)
ix. Dr. Rahima Khaton (Additional Alternate Director for the Constituency of Bangladesh, the
United Arab Emirates, Egypt and Algeria)
x. H.E. Mrs. Dilma Rousseff (NDB President and Committee Member)
Advisors and Other Participants Accompanying Directors and Alternate Directors
i. Ms. Livia Batista Maciel Braga, Infrastructure Analyst, Ministry of Finance, Brazil
ii. Mr. Dmitry Atapin, Cooperation with International Financial Institutions Division,
Department for International Financial Affairs, Ministry of Finance, Russia
iii. Dr. Prasanna V. Salian, Director, Ministry of Finance, India
iv. Ms. Xia Lyu, Director, IFI Division IV, Department of International Economic and Financial
Cooperation, Ministry of Finance, China
v. Ms. Yue Huang, Deputy Director, Department of International Economic and Financial
Cooperation, Ministry of Finance, China

COMPENSATION COMMITTEE

BUDGET, HUMAN RESOURCES AND

2

vi. Ms. Cailing Wang , Staff, Department of International Economic and Financial
Cooperation, Ministry of Finance, China
vii. Mr. Oratilwe Teisho, Assistant Director/Economist, BRICS, Global and Emerging Markets,
International and Regional Economic Policy, National Treasury, South Africa
Vice-Presidents
i. Mr. Roman Serov, Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer (“COO”)
ii. Mr. Qiangwu Zhou, Vice-President and Chief Administrative Officer (“CAO”)
iii. Mr. Monale Ratsoma, Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer (“CFO”)
Secretary to the Commitee
i. Ms. Yolande Dwarika, Director General and Corporate Secretary
Other New Development Bank Staff
(Atachment I)
1. Adoption of the Agenda
The Budget, Human Resources and Compensation Commitee (“Commitee” or “BHRC”)
considered and adopted the Agenda of the 32nd Commitee Meeting (2025-BHRC32-DOC-
001).
2. Leave of Absence
The Director for Russia was absent and represented by the Temporary Alternate Director.
The meeting had the requisite quorum.
3. Approval of Minutes and Summary of the 31
st Meeting of the Budget, Human Resources
and Compensation Commitee held on May 29, 2025
The Commitee considered and approved the Minutes (2025 -BHRC32-DOC-003) and
Summary (2025-BHRC32-DOC-004) of the 31st Commitee Meeting held on May 29, 2025.
4. Record of Inter-sessional Circulations
The Commitee took note of the Note on the Inter-sessional Circulations of the Commitee
(2025-BHRC32-DOC-005).
5. Maters Arising

3

The Commitee considered the Maters Arising (2025-BHRC32-DOC-006) and took note of
the progress.
6. Budget
a. Budget Utilisation Report H1 2025
The Commitee considered the Budget Utilisation Report for the half-year (H1) ended June
30, 2025 (2025-BHRC32-DOC-007) and took note thereof.
b. Mid-year Forecast for CY2025 and Additional Budget Requests
The Commitee considered the Mid -year Forecast for CY2026 and Additional Budget
Requests (2025-BHRC32-DOC-008). The Commitee took note thereof and recommended
the CY2025 additional budget request to the Board of Directors for approval.
c. Budget Utilisation Report H1 2025 of the Independent Evaluation Office
The Commitee considered the Budget Utilisation Report of the Independent Evaluation
Office (IEO) for the half-year (H1) ended June 30, 2025 (2025-BHRC32-DOC-009) and took
note thereof.
7. High-Level Preview of the Independent Evaluation Office Work Programme for 2026 and
Rolling Programme for 2027-2028
The Commitee considered the High-Level Preview of the Results-Based Work Programme
of the Independent Evaluation Office 2026 and Indicative Rolling Work Programme for
2027-2028 (2025-BHRC32-DOC-010-b), along with the Cover Note (2025- BHRC32-DOC-
010-a), and the Addendum – IEO Implementation Progress 2025 (2025-BHRC32-DOC-010-
c). The Commitee took note thereof and provided guidance thereon.
8. Mid-Year Review of the 2025 Annual Business Plan
The Commitee took note of the Mid-Year Review of the 2025 Annual Business Plan (2025-
BHRC32-DOC-011). The Commitee recommended the Board of Directors to take note of
the Mid-Year Review of the 2025 Annual Business Plan, and provided guidance thereon.
9. Human Resources Update
The Commitee considered the Human Resources Update (2025-BHRC32-DOC-012) and
took note thereof.

4

10. Ethics Update
The Commitee considered the Ethics Update (2025-BHRC32-DOC-013) and took note
thereof.
11. KPAs/KPIs for the Management (Closed Session)
The Commitee met in a closed session.
12. Any Other Business
The meeting ended with thanks from the Chairperson.

5

1. Adoption of the Agenda
The Budget, Human Resources and Compensation Commitee (“Commitee” or “BHRC”)
considered and adopted the Agenda of the 3 3rd Commitee Meeting (2025 -BHRC33-DOC-
001).
The Commitee adopted the Agenda of the 33rd Commitee Meeting.
2. Leave of Absence
The Director for China was absent and represented by the Alternate Director . The Director for
Russia was absent and represented by the Temporary Alternate Director. The meeting had the
requisite quorum.
3. Approval of Minutes and Summary of the 32nd Meeting of the Budget, Human Resources
and Compensation Commitee held on September 16, 2025
The Commitee considered and approved the Minutes (2025 -BHRC33-DOC-003) and
Summary (2025-BHRC33-DOC-004) of the 3 2nd Commitee Meeting held on September 16,
2025.
4. Maters Arising
The Commitee considered the Maters Arising (2025-BHRC33-DOC-005) and took note of the
progress.

3

5. Budget
a. Budget Utilisation Report Q3 2025
The Commitee considered the Budget Utilisation Report for the Period ended September 30,
2025 (2025-BHRC33-DOC-006) and took note thereof.
b. 2026 Annual Business Plan and Budget
The Commitee considered the 2026 Annual Business Plan (2025-BHRC33-DOC-007-a) and the
2026 Budget Proposal (2025- BHRC-DOC-007-b) and recommended them to the Board of
Directors for approval.
c. Budget Utilisation Report Q3 2025 of the Independent Evaluation Office
The Commitee considered the Budget Utilisation Report of the Independent Evaluation Office
for the third quarter (Q3) of 2025 (2025-BHRC33-DOC-008) and took note thereof.
d. Independent Evaluation Office Work Programme and Budget for 2026 and Indicative
Programme for 2027-2028
The Commitee considered the Independent Evaluation Office Work Programme and Budget
for 2026 and Indicative Work Programme for 2027 – 2028 (2025-BHRC33-DOC-009) and
provided guidance thereon.
6. Human Resources
a. Human Resources Update
The Commitee considered the Human Resources Update (2025-BHRC33-DOC-010) and took
note thereof.
b. Recruitment Policy
The Commitee considered the Note on Revision of the Recruitment Policy (2025-BHRC33-
DOC-011-a), the Recruitment Policy – Schedule of Changes ( 2025-BHRC33-DOC-011-b), the
New Development Bank Recruitment Policy (track) (2025-BHRC33-DOC-011-c), and the New
Development Bank Recruitment Policy (clean) ( 2025-BHRC33-DOC-011-d), and provided
guidance thereon.
c. Note on Incentives for Staff
The Commitee considered the Note on Incentives for NDB Staff Members (2025-BHRC33-
DOC-012) and took note thereof.
7. Ethics Update

4

The Commitee considered the Ethics Update (2025-BHRC33-DOC-13) and took note thereof.
8. Any Other Business
The meeting ended with thanks from the Chairperson.

5

(Atachment I)
1. Adoption of the Agenda
The Budget, Human Resources and Compensation Commitee (“Commitee” or “BHRC”)
considered and adopted the Agenda of the 3 4th Commitee Meeting (202 6-BHRC34-DOC-
001).
2. Leave of Absence
The Director for India was absent and represented by the Alternate Director for India. The
Director for China was absent and represented by the Alternate Director for China. The
additional Director for the Constituency of Bangladesh, UAE, Egypt and Algeria
(“Constituency”) was represented by the additional Alternate Director for the Constituency
for the first part of the meeting. The Director for Russia was absent and represented by the
Temporary Alternate Director . The meeting had the requisite quorum.
3. Approval of Minutes and Summary of the 33rd Meeting of the Budget, Human Resources
and Compensation Commitee held on December 3, 2025
The Commitee considered and approved the Minutes (2025 -BHRC34-DOC-003) and
Summary (2025 -BHRC34-DOC-004) of the 3 3rd Commitee Meeting held on December 3,
2025.

Page 3 of 6

4. Note on Inter-sessional Decisions of the Budget, Human Resources and Compensation
Commitee since November 19, 2025
The Commitee took note of the Note on Inter -sessional Decisions of the Budget, Human
Resources and Compensation Commitee since November 19, 2025 (2026-BHRC34-DOC-005-
REV1).
5. Maters Arising
The Commitee considered the Maters Arising (2026-BHRC34-DOC-006) and took note of the
progress.
6. Budget
a. Annual Budget Utilisation Report for 2025
The Commitee considered the Annual Budget Utilisation Report for 2025 (2025 -BHRC34-
DOC-014) and took note thereof.
b. Budget Utilisation Report CY 2025 of the Independent Evaluation Office
The Commitee considered the Budget Utilisation Report of the Independent Evaluation Office
for the period ended December 31, 2025 ( 2025-BHRC34-DOC-007), the Cover Note to the
Addendum to the Budget Utilisation Report of the Independent Evaluation Office CY 2025
(2026-BHRC34-DOC-007-b), and the Addendum to the Budget Utilisation Report of the
Independent Evaluation Office CY 2025 IEO Evaluation Expenses for CY 2025 (2025-BHRC-34-
DOC-007-c), took note of the Budget Utilisation Report of the Independent Evaluation Office
for the period ended December 31, 2025, and provided guidance thereon.
c. Proposed Revisions to the 2026 Work Programme and Budget of the Independent
Evaluation Office
The Commitee considered the proposed revisions to the 2026 Work Programme and Budget
of the Independent Evaluation Office (2026 -BHRC34-DOC-008) and provided guidance
thereon.
d. Implementation Progress Report Q1 2026 Work Programme of the Independent Evaluation
Office
The Commitee considered the Implementation Progress Report of the Independent
Evaluation Office for Q1 of 2026 (2026-BHRC34-DOC-009) and took note thereof.

Page 4 of 6

7. Corporate Level Evaluation (“CLE”) on NDB’s Human Resources Management
The Commitee considered the Corporate Level Evaluation on NDB’s Human Resources
Management (2026-BHRC34-DOC-010-b), along with Cover Note (2026-BHRC34-DOC-010-a),
Annexes (2026-BHRC34-DOC-010-c), and Presentation (2026-BHRC34-DOC-010-d), and took
note of the Corporate Level Evaluation on NDB’s Human Resources Management.
8. Human Resources
a. Human Resources Update
The Commitee considered the Human Resources Update (2026-BHRC34-DOC-011) and took
note thereof.
b. Changes to Organizational Structure
The Commitee considered the Note on Proposed Changes to the Organizational Structure of
the Research Department and Operations Departments ( 2026-BHRC34-DOC-012-a), the
Schedule of Changes on the Amendments to the Organi zational Structure of NDB (2026-
BHRC34-DOC-012-b), Organizational Structure ( track) (2026 -BHRC34-DOC-012-c), and
Organizational Structure (clean) (2026 -BHRC34-DOC-012-d), and recommended that the
Board of Directors approve the Note on Proposed Changes to the Organizational Structure of
the Research Department and Operations Departments, as amended.
9. Ethics Update
The Commitee considered the Ethics Update (2026-BHRC34-DOC-013) and took note thereof.
10. Any Other Business
The meeting ended with thanks from the Chairperson.
